---
name: Lesson Improvement
about: Suggest a clarification, missing topic, or better example for a lesson
title: "[LESSON] "
labels: enhancement, lesson
assignees: ''
---

## Lesson

Which file? (e.g., `02-events/03-event-security.md`)

## What's Missing Or Unclear

A specific section, sentence, or concept that confused you, or a pattern that should be covered but isn't.

## Why This Matters For Beginners

Why is this worth adding/changing? What would a new reader gain from the improvement?

## Proposed Change (Optional)

A draft of what you'd add or change. Even a rough sketch helps.

## References / Sources

If you have official docs or known-good resources to back up the suggestion, link them.
